content: I'm a Data Science master's candidate at Middle Tennessee State University, currently at a 4.00 GPA. My work spans the full AI lifecycle: data engineering, model training and fine-tuning, and production deployment.

I'm currently focused on Generative AI, specifically RAG pipelines, LLM fine-tuning, and deep learning models for computer vision and signal detection. I've applied this through internships at NeuralForge AI and SlashMark, and my current graduate assistantship at MTSU.
I also published a paper at ICSADL 2024 on a visible light based indoor positioning system, along with two academic projects on IoT health monitoring.

highlights.title: Generative AI & RAG
highlights.description: LangChain, vector databases, and LLM fine-tuning for document intelligence and internal Q&A.

highlights.title: Deep Learning & CV
highlights.description: CNN and Transformer models for medical imaging, gravitational wave detection, and multi-camera tracking.

highlights.title: MLOps & Data Engineering
highlights.description: AWS, Docker, MLflow, and REST APIs, with pipelines and BI dashboards in Power BI and Tableau.

highlights.title: Published Researcher
highlights.description: 1 IEEE paper on visible light indoor positioning, plus 2 academic projects on IoT health monitoring.
